div1.entryFree:
Down, subst. 1) a tract of naked, hilly land: pursue these fearful creatures o'er the --s, Ven. 677. my bosky acres and my unshrubbed d. Tp. IV, 81.
2) the --s, a well-known road for shipping near Deal: whilst our pinnace anchors in the --s, H6B IV, 1, 9.
3) soft feathers: Lucr. 1012. Wint. IV, 4, 374. H4A I, 3, 7. H4B IV, 5, 33. Troil. I, 1, 58. Oth. I, 3, 232. Cymb. III, 6, 35. Used of tender hair: his phoenix d. Compl. 93.
